'''sabubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qigong|qigong]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qigong|qigong]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sabubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæbibith|sæbibith]] || [[word:sæbibij|sæbibij]] || [[word:sæbibish|sæbibish]] || [[word:sæbibi|sæbibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sabububuth|sabububuth]] || [[word:sabububuj|sabububuj]] || [[word:sabububush|sabububush]] || [[word:sabububu|sabububu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sabubuth|sabubuth]] || [[word:sabubuj|sabubuj]] || [[word:sabubush|sabubush]] || [[word:sabubu|sabubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sabufbufth|sabufbufth]] || [[word:sabufbufj|sabufbufj]] || [[word:sabufbufsh|sabufbufsh]] || [[word:sabufbuf|sabufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sabubuthu|sabubuthu]] || [[word:sabubuju|sabubuju]] || [[word:sabubushu|sabubushu]] || [[word:sabubuku|sabubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sabubuth|sabubuth]] || [[word:sabubuj|sabubuj]] || [[word:sabubush|sabubush]] || [[word:sabubu|sabubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sabubuthul|sabubuthul]] || [[word:sabubujul|sabubujul]] || [[word:sabubushul|sabubushul]] || [[word:sabubukul|sabubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sabubuuthuthu|sabubuuthuthu]] || [[word:sabubuujuju|sabubuujuju]] || [[word:sabubuushushu|sabubuushushu]] || [[word:sabubuuku|sabubuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sabubuthun|sabubuthun]] || [[word:sabubujun|sabubujun]] || [[word:sabubushun|sabubushun]] || [[word:sabubukun|sabubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sabubuthuoro|sabubuthuoro]] || [[word:sabubujuoro|sabubujuoro]] || [[word:sabubushuoro|sabubushuoro]] || [[word:sabubukuoro|sabubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
